---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case you're trying to support.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution. Include:

- How you envision the feature working
- API or configuration changes (if applicable)
- UI changes (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any additional information or context (mockups, links to similar implementations, etc.).

## Implementation Notes (optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented technically, share them here. This helps maintainers understand feasibility.
